# Pace Zones

## Zone reference

| Zone | Usage | RPE | HR % |
|---|---|---|---|
| Easy (Z1) | Easy runs, recovery | 4–5/10 | 60–70% |
| Long run (Z3) | Saturday long run | 5–6/10 | 75–85% |
| Threshold (Z2) | Tempo / lactate work | 7–8/10 | 85–90% |
| VO₂ max (Z4) | Intervals | 8–9/10 | 90–95% |

## Calculating zones from marathon goal pace

| Zone | Offset from goal marathon pace |
|---|---|
| Easy | +60–90 s/km |
| Long run | +30–45 s/km |
| Threshold | −15–30 s/km |
| VO₂ max | −50–70 s/km |

**Example — sub-4 h marathon (5:40/km goal):**
Easy 7:00–7:30 / Long run 6:15–6:30 / Threshold 5:15–5:30 / VO₂ max 4:50–5:10
